landing_hero_subtitle: Run Claude Code, Codex, Cursor Agent, and OpenCode side by side. Orchestrate parallel sessions, track every change, and ship from plan to PR. All in one window.
landing_main_alt: Acepe main interface showing multiple parallel AI agent sessions
landing_features_description: Agent plan mode outputs a wall of text in your terminal. Acepe renders it as clean markdown with one-click copy, download, and preview toggle.
landing_plan_mode_alt: Plan mode with markdown preview, copy and download options
landing_feature_unified_history_descript: The CLI doesn't track your history across projects. Acepe indexes every session, searchable and filterable. Find that solution you wrote last week.
landing_feature_multi_agent_description: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor Agent, OpenCode. Switch with ⌘L. No vendor lock-in, just the agent that fits your task.
landing_feature_organization_description: Run multiple agents side by side. Debug in one panel while another writes tests. See all your work at once instead of tabbing through terminals.
landing_feature_keyboard_description: ⌘K command palette. ⌘L switch agent. ⌘/ change model. ⌘N new thread. Every action has a shortcut. Your mouse can rest.
landing_feature_focus_description: Expand any session to full width. Tabs keep your other work accessible. Collapse the sidebar, maximize the output. Deep work mode for complex tasks.
login_subtitle: Sign in to access the admin dashboard
changelog_page_description: What's new in Acepe. Updates are listed newest first.
feature_plan_mode_description: Agent plan mode outputs a wall of text in your terminal. Acepe renders it as clean markdown with one-click copy, download, and preview toggle.
feature_plan_mode_usecase_1: Built-in review and deepen skills refine plans before execution
feature_plan_mode_usecase_2: Plans render as clean markdown you can copy or download
feature_plan_mode_usecase_3: Read through the plan, adjust if needed, then run
feature_sessions_description: The CLI doesn't track your history across projects. Acepe indexes every session, searchable and filterable. Find that solution you wrote last week.
feature_sessions_usecase_1: Search and filter across all your agent interactions
feature_sessions_usecase_2: Recover context from previous sessions instantly
feature_sessions_usecase_3: Organize sessions by project for easy reference
feature_multi_agent_description: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor Agent, OpenCode. Switch with ⌘L. Use whichever agent fits the task.
feature_multi_agent_usecase_1: Use different agents for different tasks without context switching
feature_multi_agent_usecase_2: Run multiple agents in parallel for faster development
feature_multi_agent_usecase_3: Switch agents instantly with keyboard shortcuts
feature_keyboard_description: ⌘K command palette. ⌘L switch agent. ⌘/ change model. ⌘N new thread. Every action has a shortcut. Your mouse can rest.
feature_keyboard_usecase_1: Navigate entirely with keyboard shortcuts for flow state
feature_keyboard_usecase_2: Customize shortcuts to match your muscle memory
feature_keyboard_usecase_3: Discover new shortcuts with the searchable command palette
feature_checkpoints_description: Point-in-time file snapshots at every step. If the agent goes sideways, revert the whole session or just the files you care about.
feature_checkpoints_usecase_1: Auto-checkpoints capture state after each tool run
feature_checkpoints_usecase_2: Revert entire project or individual files to any checkpoint
feature_checkpoints_usecase_3: Roll back to any checkpoint when the agent goes in the wrong direction
feature_sql_studio_description: Query PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite without leaving the app. Schema explorer, SQL editor, and results grid in one overlay.
feature_sql_studio_usecase_1: Connect to local or remote databases with saved connections
feature_sql_studio_usecase_2: Browse schemas and tables, run queries, inspect results
feature_sql_studio_usecase_3: Execute data-changing SQL with explicit write mode control
feature_queue_description: Sessions sorted by urgency. Questions waiting for you, active errors, and running agents rise to the top. Idle sessions stay out of the way.
feature_queue_usecase_1: Answer-needed sessions stay at the top until you respond
feature_queue_usecase_2: See errors and active work before idle sessions
feature_queue_usecase_3: Switch context quickly without hunting through terminals
feature_parallel_focus_description: Split your screen between agents working on different tasks. Tab between sessions like a browser. Go full-screen on one when you need to dig in.
feature_parallel_focus_usecase_1: Run agents on separate tasks and see all of them making progress at once
feature_parallel_focus_usecase_2: Work across multiple repos at the same time without losing track
feature_parallel_focus_usecase_3: Have 10 agents working across different projects with full visibility into each
feature_skills_description: Custom workflows and tasks. Extend agent behavior with reusable skills—invoke before starting work, chain with commands, and stay in control.
feature_skills_usecase_1: Define skills that agents invoke before significant tasks
feature_skills_usecase_2: Browse and manage skills from a dedicated overlay
feature_skills_usecase_3: Compose workflows across agents and projects
blog_index_subtitle: Product updates and how-to guides for the Acepe desktop app
roadmap_page_subtitle: See what we're working on and what's next
landing_ade_description: Every new agent is another terminal window, another scrollback buffer, another thing to manually track. An ADE collapses all of that into one workspace.
landing_pillar_orchestrate_description: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor Agent, OpenCode, all in one window. Start multiple agents on separate tasks and switch between them with ⌘L.
landing_pillar_observe_title: See what every agent is doing
landing_pillar_observe_description: Each session shows its agent, project color, and live status at a glance. The attention queue surfaces what needs you. Plans, todos, file diffs, and code all render cleanly inside the app.
landing_pillar_control_description: Checkpoints snapshot your files after every tool run, so you can revert a single file or a whole session. Review plans before the agent acts on them, and intervene mid-task if something looks wrong.
landing_features_subheading: For developers who run AI agents every day.
landing_cta_description:
Acepe is free while in beta.
One download, every agent, full control.
compare_cta_description: Free forever for individuals. One download, every agent, full control.
compare_verification_description: This page only publishes claims backed by public product materials or public repository evidence.
compare_resources_title: See Acepe features behind this comparison
compare_resources_description: These product articles explain the queue, checkpoint, and SQL workflows that show up as differentiators throughout the comparison.
compare_index_description: See how Acepe stacks up against other developer tools, feature by feature.
blog_related_links_description: Keep moving through the comparison, pricing, and download funnel from the feature you just explored.
